design_philosophy.name: Tactical Minimalism (Dark Mode)
design_philosophy.description: A precision-focused, dark-mode interface inspired by drone HUDs and mission control centers. It balances professional data visualization with an immersive, high-tech aesthetic.
core_principles: Content is King: The 3D Map is the hero. UI floats above it.
Tactical Clarity: High contrast for data, subtle hierarchy for structure.
Glassmorphism: Used for overlays to maintain context of the map behind.
Motion: Smooth, physics-based transitions for drone movement and UI panels.

usage.h1: font-heading font-black text-4xl md:text-5xl tracking-tight text-white
usage.h2: font-heading font-bold text-2xl md:text-3xl tracking-tight text-white/90
usage.h3: font-heading font-bold text-xl tracking-wide text-white/80 uppercase
usage.label: font-mono text-xs font-medium tracking-wider text-cyan-500 uppercase

gradients.subtle_glow: radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.15), transparent 40%)

dashboard_map_page.description: The 3D map occupies the full screen (z-index 0). The UI panels float on top (z-index 10).
dashboard_map_page.grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 h-screen p-4 overflow-hidden

zones.top_bar: absolute top-4 left-4 right-4 h-16 glass-panel z-20 flex items-center justify-between px-6
zones.bottom_panel: absolute bottom-4 left-4 right-4 h-32 glass-panel z-20

documentation_page.grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-6 max-w-7xl mx-auto h-[calc(100vh-80px)]

route_history_page.components: Use Shadcn Table component with custom styling (transparent bg, hover effects).

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-400 text-black font-bold py-2 px-6 rounded-lg shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.3)] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white font-medium py-2 px-6 rounded-lg border border-zinc-700 hover:border-zinc-600 transition-all
buttons.icon: p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors text-zinc-400 hover:text-cyan-400

cards.base: bg-zinc-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950/50 border border-zinc-800 focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500 rounded-md text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 transition-all

navigation.item: flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5

style.drone_path: CatmullRomCurve3 with Neon Cyan tube geometry + Bloom effect
style.drone_model: Minimalist geometric cone or low-poly drone model
style.lighting: Ambient light (intensity 0.2) + Point lights (Cyan/Teal) attached to drone

universal_guidelines: NEVER use generic 'slate-500' grey. Use 'zinc' or 'neutral' for a warmer/richer dark mode.
Do not use gradients for text unless it's a very subtle brand moment.
Ensure all glassmorphism panels have a 1px border (`border-white/10` or similar) to define edges.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. REFINE THE CSS: The existing `App.css` is legacy. Create a new `globals.css` that imports Tailwind directives and sets up the custom @layer base styles for fonts and colors defined in this JSON. Gradually migrate components to use Tailwind utility classes instead of `.sidebar`, `.header` classes.
2. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: Add the custom colors (cyan, zinc) and fonts (Chivo, JetBrains Mono) to `tailwind.config.js`.
3. ENHANCE THE MAP: implementing the 'Map Page' with the overlay layout described above. Use `react-three-fiber` for the map.
4. CREATE ROUTE HISTORY: Build the new 'Route History' page using a Shadcn Table, styled with the 'cards.base' style.
5. MIGRATE COMPONENTS: Update existing components to use Shadcn UI primitives where possible (Buttons, Inputs, Dialogs, Toasts).
6. DOCUMENTATION: Ensure the markdown viewer allows for syntax highlighting with a dark theme (e.g., vsc-dark-plus).

hero_backgrounds.description: Cyberpunk city night - useful for ambient backgrounds or login screen
Drone flying at night - good for 'About' or 'Landing'

textures.description: Abstract dark flow - subtle texture for card backgrounds
